# Support

Thanks for using the SignalX docs!

## Questions about the framework

This repo only holds the docs site source. For usage questions, ideas, and general discussion about SignalX itself, please use
[GitHub Discussions on `signalxjs/core`](https://github.com/signalxjs/core/discussions). It keeps conversations searchable for everyone and is the fastest way to get a response.

## Bug reports about the docs

If you've spotted a problem with the docs site itself (broken link, typo, rendering bug, missing page), open an issue here:

- [Report a docs bug](https://github.com/signalxjs/docs/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- [Suggest content / improvements](https://github.com/signalxjs/docs/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)

Before filing, please:

- Check existing [issues](https://github.com/signalxjs/docs/issues?q=is%3Aissue) to avoid duplicates.
- Include the URL of the affected page and a screenshot if relevant.

## Bugs in the SignalX framework itself

File those in the relevant package repo, not here:

- Core framework: <https://github.com/signalxjs/core/issues>
- Live code: <https://github.com/signalxjs/live-code/issues>
- Monaco editor: <https://github.com/signalxjs/monaco-editor/issues>

## Security vulnerabilities

**Please do not open a public issue for security problems.** See
[SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the private reporting process.

## Contributing

Pull requests are very welcome — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for
how to set up a local copy of the docs site.
